home.title: Take the helm —
home.subtitle: Thirteen AI analysts research, debate, stress-test risk, and converge on a single, traceable trade decision — streamed live in your browser.
home.p1Desc: Market · sentiment · news · fundamentals — four analysts work in parallel.
home.p2Desc: Bull and bear researchers debate; the research manager converges on a plan.
home.p3Desc: The trader proposes an action, entry, stop-loss and position size.
home.p4Desc: Aggressive, conservative and neutral sides stress-test size and stop-loss.
home.p5Desc: The chief decision officer issues a 5-tier rating, target price and horizon.
home.vp1Desc: Watch all 13 agents think and debate — not a black-box verdict.
home.vp2Desc: Bring your own LLM keys; switch across 20+ providers — deep models for the hard steps, fast models for the rest.
home.vp3Desc: Act on the decision — trade tokenized equities via crypto exchanges and earn fee rebates.

analyze.title: Run an analysis
analyze.subtitle: Stream the 13-agent pipeline live. Each analyst and debate turn appears as it completes.
analyze.ratingScale: 5-tier rating: Buy / Overweight / Hold / Underweight / Sell
analyze.emptyHint: Configure the run and press Run analysis.
analyze.errAuth: Your LLM API key is invalid or missing. Open Settings to configure your provider and key.
analyze.errNetwork: Couldn't reach the LLM provider. Check your network or the provider/backend URL in Settings.
analyze.errRateLimit: The provider rate-limited the request (429). Wait a moment and retry.
analyze.errGeneric: The run failed. If this is a configuration issue, open Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure model, keys, data sources and advanced parameters.
settings.languageNote: Interface and report language follow the URL locale — switch via the nav bar (e.g. /zh/analyze).
settings.vendorsHint: Comma-separated vendor chains per category (left-to-right fallback).
settings.baseUrlRequired: Base URL is required for a custom provider.
settings.modelHint: Pick a provider, then choose a deep-thinking model and a fast model.
settings.keySecurity: Keys are AES-256 encrypted at rest, decrypted only when calling the model — never logged or exposed in plaintext.
settings.advDebateHint: Each round = one bull + one bear turn. More rounds = more thorough.
settings.advRiskHint: Rounds for the aggressive / conservative / neutral discussion.

health.title: Service health
health.subtitle: Backend self-checks and per-provider API-key status.
health.providersSignIn: Sign in to view your API-key status.

tokenized.homeTitle: Buy tokenized stocks with crypto — trade 24/7,
tokenized.homeDesc: Once the analysis is done, open an account at one of these exchanges to trade tokenized stocks. Register with our invite code to earn fee rebates.
tokenized.mirrorsHint: If the official domain is blocked by DNS, use one of these mirrors:
tokenized.sponsoredBy: Fee rebates powered by our sponsor rebateto.me ↗
tokenized.detailDesc: {ticker} trades as a tokenized stock on Binance, OKX, and Gate. Register with our invite code and 20%+ of every trade's fee is automatically returned to your account within about an hour.
tokenized.disclaimer: For reference only — not investment advice. Crypto and tokenized stocks carry risk, including loss of principal. The sign-up links are referral links that support this project at no extra cost to you; using them is voluntary. Comply with your local laws.
tokenized.appNote: Signing up in the app? Don't skip the invite-code field — no code, no rebate, and it can't be added later.
tokenized.idNote: One account per ID per exchange. Already registered? A family member can sign up with the code instead.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.tagline: Sign in to use analysis, history & settings
auth.lockHint: Protected pages redirect here to sign in
